ch0295_90_omodaka/0101_0701_01_10:
I’d guessed it was you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]. Good day.
ch0295_90_omodaka/0101_0701_02_10:
I was sure we’d have a chance to meet.
Let us continue honing our skills today.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7101_0701_01_10:
Honed strength clashing against honed
strength captures the crowd, making
their hearts race...
ch0295_90_omodaka/7101_0701_02_10:
Now that I’ve awakened my arc suit, I’m
one step closer to my ideal world.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7101_0701_03_10:
This is very promising. I cannot contain my
excitement for what lies ahead and what
my new self can achieve.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7102_0701_01_10:
As Paldea’s Top Champion, I am relieved to
have awakened my arc suit.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7102_0701_02_10:
As I am in a position to guide others, I must
lead by example!
ch0295_90_omodaka/7103_0701_01_10:
When I walk the streets of Pasio, everyone
greets me in a friendly manner.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7103_0701_02_10:
I get so happy that I cannot help having
lively conversations about Pokémon!
ch0295_90_omodaka/7104_0701_01_10:
Daily, diligent endeavors will lead us
to greater heights.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7104_0701_02_10:
Even with my Top Champion title and an
arc suit, I won’t stand still.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7105_0701_02_10:
I would very much like you to reach
the same heights as me.
ch0295_90_omodaka/7105_0701_03_10:
If we push each other to greater heights, we
are certain to achieve greater synergy!
ch0295_90_omodaka/1701_0701_01_10:
Oh, perfect timing. I have something I want
to give you.
ch0295_90_omodaka/1701_0702_01_10:
This is fitting for a young Trainer shouldering
the future, such as yourself.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2501_0701_01_10:
Arceus is the deified Pokémon believed to
have shaped the world.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2501_0701_02_10:
You could say it is the Pokémon world’s
Top Champion.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2501_0701_03_10:
I am curious to know the extent of its
immense power.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2501_0702_01_10: Could even a deified Pokémon be dethroned?
ch0295_90_omodaka/2501_0702_02_10:
If so, it makes you wonder what sort of
training Arceus undergoes each day.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0701_01_10: Do you like books? I love them.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0701_02_10:
New knowledge hones the self, drawing
us to greater heights.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0701_03_10:
Even on Pasio, I’ve had the privilege of
reading many books. They were all quite
interesting.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0702_01_10: There is still much I don’t know in this world.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0702_02_10:
We owe our gratitude to those who compiled
their knowledge and research into books.
ch0295_90_omodaka/2511_0702_03_10:
I wish to continue reading many more books.
I do hope you’ll join me!
ch0295_90_omodaka/3001_0701_01_10:
Good morning. I can see the optimism in
your eyes. May the light shine bright and
guide you wherever you’re headed.
ch0295_90_omodaka/3003_0701_01_10:
On Pasio—where mighty Trainers gather—I
am both a Champion and a challenger. The
same is true for you.
ch0295_90_omodaka/3005_0701_01_10:
Good evening. That light deep within your
eyes... It shines brighter than a full moon.
